description_long: This is a Nintendo 2DS handheld gaming console, featuring a flat, rectangular body with rounded corners and a two-tone color scheme of white and red. The front face displays a large upper LCD screen with the 'Nintendo 2DS' logo, a lower touchscreen, a circular control pad, a D-pad, and several physical buttons including 'Start', 'Select', and 'Sleep'. The left and right edges are accented in red, with visible slots for game cartridges and SD cards, as well as a volume slider and stylus slot. The back is mostly white with three black screws and a red accent band, and it includes regulatory information and branding. The device is compact and designed for portability, with all controls and ports easily accessible from the front and sides. Its construction appears to be primarily plastic, with some internal metal components for structural support.
description: A compact Nintendo 2DS handheld gaming console with a white and red color scheme, dual screens, and multiple physical control buttons. The device is flat, portable, and features accessible slots and ports on its sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing both screens, control pad, D-pad, and main buttons, with the Nintendo 2DS logo visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the red edge, cartridge slot, and volume slider.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white back panel, three screws, and a red accent band.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the stylus slot and additional red edge details.
